meaning: n.(汽车赛场周围的)阿姆科金属防护挡板[源自商标名]
examples: It was there that he met legendary steel veteran Thomas Graham, with whom he left to save beleaguered Armco.
Danner, 59, an easy-mannered former electrical engineer from Ohio, started his lobbying career in the early '70s for Armco steel company.
As Kimberly Strassel notes in her May 17 Wall Street Journal column, when Bain invested in buying and upgrading the steel maker, its owner, Armco, was considering shutting it down.
